results.title: Earnings | Comcast Corporation - Cmcsa
results.snippet: Comcast provides access to its Q1 earnings release, trending schedule, presentation, and webcast from its official financials page.

results.title: Comcast Q1 2026 Earnings Report
results.snippet: Comcast is scheduled to report Q1 2026 earnings on April 23, 2026 before the market opens, with consensus EPS estimates at $0.82 and expected revenue of $30.42 billion.

results.title: What to Expect From Comcast's Next Quarterly Earnings ...
results.snippet: Analysts expect CMCSA to report Q1 2026 EPS of $0.83 on April 23, 2026. Full year 2026 EPS is forecasted at $3.66.

results.title: Comcast to Host First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
results.snippet: Comcast will release Q1 2026 financial results and host a conference call on April 23, 2026 at 8:30 a.m. ET. The call will be available via webcast on their investor relations site.

results.title: Comcast (CMCSA) Earnings: Latest Report ... - Public Investing
results.snippet: Comcast's Q1 2026 earnings are expected on April 23, 2026 with an estimated EPS of $0.73. Its most recent Q4 2025 results showed an EPS beat.

results.title: Xfinity Launches the Largest Marketplace for Premium Streaming Bundles Featuring Peacock, Netflix, Apple TV, The Disney+, Hulu Bundle and HBO Max
results.snippet: Comcast’s Xfinity unveiled a major expansion to its StreamSaver bundles in April 2026, adding the Disney+, Hulu Bundle and HBO Max alongside Peacock, Netflix and Apple TV. Customers can browse and purchase various bundles to save up to 45 percent on premium streaming services.

results.title: How to Get Peacock Premium With Xfinity
results.snippet: Xfinity customers with qualifying Gig speed internet plans can receive Peacock Premium included for 2-3 years. The service offers exclusive originals, hit series, new movies from theaters, live sports, and more.

results.title: Streaming Service Upgrade
results.snippet: Xfinity forum users discussed how to upgrade from promotional Peacock Premium to Peacock Premium Plus. The upgrade requires purchasing the higher tier at full retail price through the account.

results.title: Peacock: Stream TV and Movies Online, Watch Live News ...
results.snippet: Peacock is a streaming service offering TV shows, movies, exclusive originals, live news, sports, and additional content. Access is limited to users physically located in the US.

results.title: Xfinity Launches the Largest Marketplace for Premium Streaming Bundles Featuring Peacock, Netflix, Apple TV, the Disney+, Hulu Bundle and HBO Max
results.snippet: Comcast’s Xfinity announced an expansion of its StreamSaver bundles on April 9, 2026, incorporating Peacock with Netflix, Apple TV, Disney+, Hulu, and HBO Max. The new marketplace allows customers to save up to 45 percent on multiple streaming combinations.

results.title: Xfinity and Comcast Business High-Speed Internet Now Available to 13,000 Homes and Businesses in The Villages
results.snippet: Comcast announced a major milestone today in the company's continued efforts to expand ultra-fast, reliable Internet in Central Florida.

results.title: Xfinity Plans, Pricing and Offers - Check Xfinity Availability
results.snippet: Xfinity offers a lock-in price on 300 Mbps WiFi with equipment and unlimited data included for 5 years at $45 per month, plus one year of Unlimited Mobile on us for new customers.

results.title: How the heck is this a thing in 2026? 3 Mbps for $55/mo? ...
results.snippet: Reddit users discuss outrage over a 3 Mbps plan costing $55 per month in 2026 and recommend switching to Comcast/Xfinity's $50 per month gigabit promo locked in for 5 years.

results.title: Xfinity Internet Deals and Promotions
results.snippet: Xfinity promotes internet deals including $45 per month for 5 years on 300 Mbps service with no annual contract. Various offers end in April 2026.

results.title: Ultra-Fast, Reliable Internet from Xfinity Coming to Bradford ...
results.snippet: Xfinity is expanding ultra-fast internet to Bradford County with completion expected by Fall 2026 as part of Comcast's ongoing efforts.
